title: Google OAuth sign-in fails due to DNS error
symptom: When attempting to sign in with Google credentials in n8n, the user encounters a 'DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN' error instead of being redirected back to n8n.
not_this_if: Using a public domain for n8n
Error occurs in a different environment
root_cause: The error occurs because the domain being used for the n8n instance is not publicly accessible. This can happen if the domain settings in Railway are misconfigured or if the wrong domain is being used for OAuth redirection.
fix_steps: Verify the domain settings in Railway
Ensure you are using the correct public domain for your n8n instance
Update the OAuth settings in Google Cloud with the correct domain
agent_instruction: Check and update the domain settings in Railway to ensure they are correct for Google OAuth.
